# Asaptic Cross-Standard — full corpus map (llms-full.txt)
# Public-interest, source-linked China-export compliance comparisons. AI-compiled, multi-model cross-verified, NOT human-verified; informational only — verify with the official regulator. Trilingual (en/zh-Hans/zh-Hant). License CC-BY-4.0.
# Updated: 2026-06-14 | 393 comparisons · 23 product categories · 95 markets
# Machine-readable index: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/index.json

## Air-source heat pump
- Air-source heat pump -> Australia (RCM/AS-NZS): GEMS registration, MEPS and Zoned Energy Rating Label evidence under the applicable air-conditioner determination, RCM marking through an Australian or New Zealand Responsible Supplier, EESS safety evidence to AS/NZS ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/heat-pump-china-to-australia
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/heat-pump-china-to-australia.json
- Air-source heat pump -> Canada (Health Canada): NRCan minimum performance and EnerGuide filing, CSA/SCC electrical safety certification to Canadian standards such as CSA C22.2 No. 236 and CSA C22.2 No. 120, federal HFC controls, and English/French bilingual marking...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/heat-pump-china-to-canada
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/heat-pump-china-to-canada.json
- Air-source heat pump -> European Union (CE): F-gas certification, Ecodesign SCOP thresholds (EN 14511/EN 14825), Pressure Equipment Directive classification, and CE marking under LVD and EMC directives are the major EU compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/heat-pump-china-to-eu
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/heat-pump-china-to-eu.json
- Air-source heat pump -> India (BIS/ALMM): For India, the main gaps are BIS market-access checks for AC-type products and components, IS 1391/IS 302 electrical-safety evidence where applicable, BEE star labelling for covered air-conditioner categories, refrige...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/heat-pump-china-to-india
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/heat-pump-china-to-india.json
- Air-source heat pump -> Japan (PSE/JET): PSE / DENAN applicability, Top Runner energy efficiency obligations for applicable air conditioners and heat-pump products, fluorocarbon controls under Japan's Fluorocarbons Emission Control Act, and re-testing or doc...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/heat-pump-china-to-japan
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/heat-pump-china-to-japan.json
- Air-source heat pump -> Mexico (NOM / COFEPRIS): China-market air-source heat pump files do not transfer automatically to Mexico. The main gaps are NOM-011-ENER or NOM-023-ENER efficiency testing for applicable air-conditioning heat-pump configurations, NOM-003-SCFI...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/heat-pump-china-to-mexico
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/heat-pump-china-to-mexico.json
- Air-source heat pump -> United Kingdom (UKCA): UKCA marking (under retained Ecodesign, EMC, and product safety SIs), F-gas quota compliance under SI 2022/1013, and pressure equipment conformity under SI 2016/1105 are the mandatory gates for air-source heat pumps e...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/heat-pump-china-to-uk
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/heat-pump-china-to-uk.json
- Air-source heat pump -> United States (UL/FCC): DOE minimum efficiency standards (HSPF2/SEER2), UL 60335-2-40 NRTL safety listing, and EPA refrigerant SNAP approval are the three mandatory gates for air-source heat pumps entering the US market from China.
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/heat-pump-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/heat-pump-china-to-us.json

## Battery energy storage (BESS)
- Battery energy storage (BESS) -> Algeria (IANOR / CREG / Sonelgaz): For BESS exported from China to Algeria, the main compliance gaps are: IANOR conformity to IEC 62619 for lithium battery safety and IEC 62933 for energy storage system performance, CREG and Sonelgaz/GRTE grid-connecti...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/bess-china-to-algeria
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/bess-china-to-algeria.json
- Battery energy storage (BESS) -> Angola (IANORQ / IRSEA / ENDE): Angola does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to an IEC 62619 mandatory certification regime. The primary BESS deployment context in Angola is solar-plus-storage E...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/bess-china-to-angola
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/bess-china-to-angola.json
- Battery energy storage (BESS) -> Argentina: For BESS exported from China to Argentina, there is no single universal Argentina BESS product certificate that automatically replaces project due diligence. The main gaps are IRAM / IEC evidence requested by buyers o...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/bess-china-to-argentina
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/bess-china-to-argentina.json
- Battery energy storage (BESS) -> Armenia (SARM / PSRC / ENA): Armenia is a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU), which means EAEU Technical Regulations (TR CU / TR EAEU) and the EAC mark apply to in-scope products — this is a genuine certification pathway for Chinese BES...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/bess-china-to-armenia
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/bess-china-to-armenia.json

## Cosmetics & personal care

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/cosmetics-china-to-australia
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/cosmetics-china-to-australia.json
- Cosmetics & personal care -> Canada (Health Canada): Chinese cosmetics exporters can generally sell cosmetics in Canada without pre-market approval, but the product must be safe, comply with the Food and Drugs Act and Cosmetic Regulations, meet Hotlist ingredient restri...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/cosmetics-china-to-canada
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/cosmetics-china-to-canada.json
- Cosmetics & personal care -> European Union (CE): Chinese cosmetics exporters must appoint an EU-established Responsible Person, complete CPNP pre-market notification, commission a CPSR from a qualified EU safety assessor, verify all ingredients against EU Annex II–V...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/cosmetics-china-to-eu
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/cosmetics-china-to-eu.json
- Cosmetics & personal care -> United Kingdom (UKCA): Appointing a UK Responsible Person and completing SCPN notification, obtaining a CPSR from a qualified assessor, screening formulations against current UK substance schedules (which are diverging from EU post-Brexit),...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/cosmetics-china-to-uk
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/cosmetics-china-to-uk.json
- Cosmetics & personal care -> United States (UL/FCC): MoCRA facility registration, product listing, safety substantiation, and adverse event reporting are the core new US obligations; sunscreen reformulation (OTC drug, not cosmetic) and color additive pre-approval under ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/cosmetics-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/cosmetics-china-to-us.json

## Data-center liquid cooling (cold plate / CDU)
- Data-center liquid cooling (cold plate / CDU) -> European Union (CE): Beyond CE (LVD/Machinery/EMC), the gaps are pressurised coolant-loop safety, RoHS/REACH plus F-gas/PFAS coolant rules, and EU server/data-centre Ecodesign (Reg 2019/424) plus Energy Efficiency Directive reporting.
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/datacenter-cooling-china-to-eu
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/datacenter-cooling-china-to-eu.json
- Data-center liquid cooling (cold plate / CDU) -> United States (UL/FCC): UL/NRTL listing of the cooling unit, NFPA fire/liquid handling, ASHRAE practice, and EPA PFAS coolant scrutiny are the gaps vs Chinese GB.
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/datacenter-cooling-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/datacenter-cooling-china-to-us.json

## Electric bicycle (e-bike)
- Electric bicycle (e-bike) -> Australia (RCM/AS-NZS): For Australia, the critical China-to-AU gap is classification: a road-legal e-bike is generally either a pedalec complying with EN 15194 and ≤250W continuous rated power, or a power-assisted pedal cycle with auxiliary...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/e-bike-china-to-australia
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/e-bike-china-to-australia.json
- Electric bicycle (e-bike) -> Canada (Health Canada): Canada is not a CE-style self-declaration market: e-bikes must fit federal import classification and provincial road-use limits, commonly the former power-assisted bicycle benchmark of ≤500W and motor assistance not a...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/e-bike-china-to-canada
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/e-bike-china-to-canada.json
- Electric bicycle (e-bike) -> European Union (CE): Pedelec e-bikes ≤250W/25km/h need CE marking under EN 15194:2017 (Machinery Directive); Chinese motors rated 251–400W trigger full EU type-approval under Regulation (EU) 168/2013 (L1e-A) — the critical export-blocking...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/e-bike-china-to-eu
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/e-bike-china-to-eu.json
- Electric bicycle (e-bike) -> United Kingdom (UKCA): Motor power (≤250 W UK vs ≤400 W CN), UKCA marking under BS EN 15194:2017, BS EN 50604-1 battery re-testing, and appointment of a UK Responsible Person are the four major gaps for Chinese e-bikes entering the UK market.
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/e-bike-china-to-uk
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/e-bike-china-to-uk.json
- Electric bicycle (e-bike) -> United States (UL/FCC): UL 2849 electrical-system and UL 2271 battery certification (city-mandatory in NYC under Local Law 39), CPSC 16 CFR 1512 bicycle safety, and federal 15 USC 2085 low-speed e-bike classification are the primary US compl...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/e-bike-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/e-bike-china-to-us.json

  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ev-charger-china-to-argentina.json

- EV charger -> Australia (RCM/AS-NZS): EESS Level 3 registration, RCM mark, Type 2 / CCS2 connector hardware redesign (GB/T 20234 connectors are incompatible), and fresh AS/NZS 61851.1 and ACMA EMC testing are the top Australian gaps for Chinese EV chargers.

- EV charger -> Cameroon (ANOR / ARSEL / ENEO): For China-made EV chargers entering Cameroon, the confirmed practical gaps are: (1) connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC), as Cameroon follows the IEC 62196 ecosystem and GB/...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/ev-charger-china-to-cameroon
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ev-charger-china-to-cameroon.json

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/ev-charger-china-to-canada

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/ev-charger-china-to-thailand
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ev-charger-china-to-thailand.json

  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ev-charger-china-to-uk.json
- EV charger -> United States (UL/FCC): UL 2594 listing, SAE J1772 or NACS connector compatibility, and NEC 625 installation requirements are the main gaps compared with Chinese GB/T EV-charger compliance.
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/ev-charger-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ev-charger-china-to-us.json

## Food-contact materials
- Food-contact materials -> Australia (RCM/AS-NZS): Australia does not operate an EU-style food-contact material authorisation or positive-list system for all packaging materials. Chinese exporters should instead demonstrate that the material will not make food unsafe ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/food-contact-china-to-australia
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/food-contact-china-to-australia.json
- Food-contact materials -> Canada (Health Canada): Chinese food-contact material exporters targeting Canada must satisfy the Food and Drugs Act and Food and Drug Regulations Division 23 safety rule that packaging must not yield harmful substances to food. Canada gener...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/food-contact-china-to-canada
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/food-contact-china-to-canada.json
- Food-contact materials -> European Union (CE): Chinese food-contact material exporters targeting the EU must satisfy Reg 1935/2004 safety and inertness requirements, check every intentionally added substance against the EU Union list (Reg 10/2011 for plastics), re...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/food-contact-china-to-eu
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/food-contact-china-to-eu.json
- Food-contact materials -> United Kingdom (UKCA): UK-retained Regulation 1935/2004, UK-assimilated Plastics Regulation 10/2011 (substance authorisation + migration limits + Annex III testing), GMP Regulation 2023/2006, and a written English-language Declaration of Co...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/food-contact-china-to-uk
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/food-contact-china-to-uk.json
- Food-contact materials -> United States (UL/FCC): The US FDA regulates food-contact materials through a substance-by-substance approval system under 21 CFR 174-179 — critically, FDA issues no premarket certificate or compliance mark, so manufacturers must self-certif...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/food-contact-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/food-contact-china-to-us.json

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/furniture-china-to-uk

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/furniture-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/furniture-china-to-us.json

## GaN fast charger / power adapter
- GaN fast charger / power adapter -> European Union (CE): CE via LVD (EN IEC 62368-1) plus EMC, plus the Ecodesign external-power-supply efficiency (Code of Conduct / Reg 2019/1782) are the gaps; USB-PD interoperability is expected.
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/gan-charger-china-to-eu
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/gan-charger-china-to-eu.json
- GaN fast charger / power adapter -> United Kingdom (UKCA): For Great Britain, the core gaps are UKCA or accepted CE marking under the Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 and EMC Regulations 2016, UK RoHS compliance, and a compliant BS 1363 plug under the Plugs and ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/gan-charger-china-to-uk
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/gan-charger-china-to-uk.json
- GaN fast charger / power adapter -> United States (UL/FCC): UL 62368-1 NRTL listing plus FCC Part 15 plus DoE Level VI external-power-supply efficiency plus California CEC registration are the gaps vs Chinese GB.
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/gan-charger-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/gan-charger-china-to-us.json

- Grid-tied PV inverter -> Israel (SII / Israel Electricity Authority): For solar PV inverters exported from China to Israel, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming whether the inverter is within an SII mandatory Israeli Standard or import-control route; (2) obtaining model-specific S...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/solar-inverter-china-to-israel

- Grid-tied PV inverter -> Japan (PSE/JET): PSE marking, JET grid-interconnection certification, and 50/60 Hz dual-region support are the gaps; Chinese grid-code compliance is not accepted.

## Home/clinical medical device
- Home/clinical medical device -> Australia (RCM/AS-NZS): Chinese manufacturers entering Australia must appoint an Australian Sponsor, obtain ARTG inclusion under TGA classification, hold an ISO 13485 certificate from a TGA-recognised CAB, demonstrate AS/NZS IEC 60601-1 elec...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/medical-device-china-to-australia
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/medical-device-china-to-australia.json
- Home/clinical medical device -> Brazil (INMETRO): Brazil requires ANVISA registration or notification (RDC 751/2022 Classes I–IV), Brazilian GMP certification (B-GMP, mandatory for Class III/IV), INMETRO electromedical certification (ABNT NBR IEC 60601-1), a Brazil-i...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/medical-device-china-to-brazil
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/medical-device-china-to-brazil.json
- Home/clinical medical device -> Canada (Health Canada): MDSAP-certified ISO 13485 QMS (mandatory for Class II–IV manufacturers since 2019 via MDL), a Canadian MDL, an MDEL for the importer (requiring documented procedures per s.45 — not an ISO 13485 certificate), bilingual...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/medical-device-china-to-canada
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/medical-device-china-to-canada.json
- Home/clinical medical device -> European Union (CE): EU MDR 2017/745 conformity, usually through a Notified Body, an EU Authorised Representative, EUDAMED and UDI obligations, and ISO 13485 QMS evidence are the main gaps beyond NMPA; IEC 60601 safety largely transfers f...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/medical-device-china-to-eu
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/medical-device-china-to-eu.json
- Home/clinical medical device -> India (BIS/ALMM): Appointing an Indian Authorized Agent and obtaining a CDSCO Import Licence (Form MD-15 via MD-14 application on SUGAM) are the primary structural gaps versus NMPA; IS/IEC 60601-1 safety largely transfers from GB 9706....
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/medical-device-china-to-india
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/medical-device-china-to-india.json
- Home/clinical medical device -> Japan (PSE/JET): Japan's PMD Act requires a licensed Japanese Marketing Authorization Holder (MAH) — a Chinese manufacturer cannot hold the authorization directly — plus Foreign Manufacturer Registration, MHLW Ordinance 169 QMS compli...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/medical-device-china-to-japan
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/medical-device-china-to-japan.json
- Home/clinical medical device -> Mexico (NOM / COFEPRIS): Mexico generally requires COFEPRIS sanitary registration before sale or import of medical devices, local Class I/II/III classification, applicable NOM compliance including NOM-241-SSA1 GMP and Spanish labelling under ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/medical-device-china-to-mexico
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/medical-device-china-to-mexico.json
- Home/clinical medical device -> Saudi Arabia (SASO/SABER): SFDA Medical Device Marketing Authorization (MDMA), a Saudi-based Authorized Representative, ISO 13485 QMS certification by an SFDA-recognized body, and Arabic-language labelling are the primary new requirements beyon...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/medical-device-china-to-saudi
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/medical-device-china-to-saudi.json
- Home/clinical medical device -> United Kingdom (UKCA): UKCA marking (or CE under transitional acceptance expiring by class by 2030), a mandatory UK Responsible Person registered on MHRA DORS, and ISO 13485 QMS assessed by a UK Approved Body are the main gaps beyond NMPA; ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/medical-device-china-to-uk
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/medical-device-china-to-uk.json
- Home/clinical medical device -> United States (UL/FCC): FDA 510(k) clearance, establishment registration and device listing, a US Agent, and 21 CFR 820 QMS are the main gaps beyond NMPA; IEC 60601 safety largely transfers from GB 9706.
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/medical-device-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/medical-device-china-to-us.json

## Industrial electric motor
- Industrial electric motor -> Australia (RCM/AS-NZS): GEMS Registry pre-supply registration (unique to Australia, no CN equivalent) and the RCM mark (combining electrical safety and EMC) are the critical market-access gaps; IE3 MEPS floors are nominally aligned but test ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/industrial-motor-china-to-australia
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/industrial-motor-china-to-australia.json
- Industrial electric motor -> Brazil (INMETRO): INMETRO compulsory certification and Lei 10.295/2001 premium efficiency (IR3) are the primary gaps; Chinese motors must obtain an INMETRO conformity mark and meet ABNT NBR 17094 safety requirements before Brazilian ma...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/industrial-motor-china-to-brazil
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/industrial-motor-china-to-brazil.json
- Industrial electric motor -> European Union (CE): EU Ecodesign Regulation 2019/1781 minimum efficiency (IE3/IE4) and CE conformity for LVD/EMC are the gaps; many Chinese motors fall below the EU MEPS class.
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/industrial-motor-china-to-eu
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/industrial-motor-china-to-eu.json
- Industrial electric motor -> India (BIS/ALMM): IS 12615:2018 is the applicable Indian efficiency standard and BIS ISI mark under FMCS is the certification route for foreign manufacturers IF required. Whether BIS ISI mark certification is currently mandatory under ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/industrial-motor-china-to-india
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/industrial-motor-china-to-india.json
- Industrial electric motor -> Japan (PSE/JET): Japan's Top Runner Program mandates IE3-equivalent minimum efficiency for 3-phase induction motors (0.75–375 kW) under the Act on Rationalizing Energy Use; Chinese motors meeting GB 18613-2020 Grade 3 (IE3) are techni...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/industrial-motor-china-to-japan
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/industrial-motor-china-to-japan.json
- Industrial electric motor -> Mexico (NOM / COFEPRIS): Mexico is not a CCC carry-over market: three-phase induction motors must be screened against NOM-016-ENER-2016 under CONUEE, mapped to applicable electrical safety NOMs such as NOM-001-SEDE and NOM-003-SCFI, and certi...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/industrial-motor-china-to-mexico
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/industrial-motor-china-to-mexico.json
- Industrial electric motor -> Saudi Arabia (SASO/SABER): Saudi Arabia requires IE3 minimum efficiency (SASO/SEEC regulation referencing IEC 60034-30-1) and SABER PCoC+SCoC market-access conformity certificates; most Chinese motors meet the IE3 efficiency floor but must obta...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/industrial-motor-china-to-saudi
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/industrial-motor-china-to-saudi.json
- Industrial electric motor -> United Kingdom (UKCA): UK post-Brexit regulations mirror the EU framework: IE3/IE4 MEPS (retained Ecodesign via SI 2021/745), Electrical Equipment Safety Regulations 2016, and UK EMC Regulations 2016 all apply — the key additional gaps vers...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/industrial-motor-china-to-uk
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/industrial-motor-china-to-uk.json
- Industrial electric motor -> United States (UL/FCC): US DOE energy conservation standards, NEMA Premium or IE3-equivalent efficiency expectations, NEMA MG-1 design evidence, UL listing, and IEEE 112 Method B testing are the main gaps; GB/T 1032 testing alone is not the ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/industrial-motor-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/industrial-motor-china-to-us.json

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/led-luminaire-china-to-mexico
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/led-luminaire-china-to-mexico.json
- LED luminaire -> United Kingdom (UKCA): LED luminaires exported from China to the UK require UKCA marking (or CE under current transitional easement), compliance with BS EN 60598, ecodesign efficacy thresholds under SI 2021/1095, and a UK Responsible Person...

- LED luminaire -> United States (UL/FCC): NRTL certification (UL 1598 + UL 8750) and FCC Part 15B SDoC are the critical US gaps for Chinese LED luminaires. Note: there is no single federal consumer safety mark in the US — NRTL listing is effectively required ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/led-luminaire-china-to-us

- Lithium battery / power bank -> United States (UL/FCC): To export lithium batteries or power banks from China to the United States, you need: (1) NRTL safety listing under UL 1642 (cells), UL 2054 (packs), or UL 2056 (power banks) — there is no single federal mandatory mar...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/lithium-battery-china-to-us

  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ppe-respirator-china-to-australia.json

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/ppe-respirator-china-to-canada
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ppe-respirator-china-to-canada.json

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/ppe-respirator-china-to-eu
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ppe-respirator-china-to-eu.json
- PPE / respirator (mask) -> India (BIS/ALMM): India separates non-medical respirator standards and medical-device mask regulation by intended use. IS 9473 is a BIS respirator standard and should be treated as a voluntary presumption route unless a current Indian ...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/ppe-respirator-china-to-india
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ppe-respirator-china-to-india.json

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/ppe-respirator-china-to-uk
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ppe-respirator-china-to-uk.json
- PPE / respirator (mask) -> United States (UL/FCC): Chinese KN95 certification (GB 2626) is NOT equivalent to US NIOSH N95 approval (42 CFR Part 84) — there is no mutual recognition, and COVID-era EUAs permitting KN95 imports have expired. All particulate respirators s...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/ppe-respirator-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/ppe-respirator-china-to-us.json

- Sodium-ion battery storage (Na-ion) -> European Union (CE): Na-ion faces the same EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 obligations as Li-ion, including carbon footprint, due diligence, and battery passport requirements, plus CE and EN IEC 62619 expectations; one upside is easier UN...

  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/na-ion-storage-china-to-eu.json
- Sodium-ion battery storage (Na-ion) -> United Kingdom (UKCA): Na-ion BESS entering Great Britain must be assessed under the applicable UK product-safety SIs for UKCA or currently recognised CE marking, with BS EN IEC 62619 used only as a voluntary presumption-of-conformity route...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/na-ion-storage-china-to-uk
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/na-ion-storage-china-to-uk.json
- Sodium-ion battery storage (Na-ion) -> United States (UL/FCC): UL 9540 system listing, UL 1973 cell and battery evidence, and NFPA 855 installation requirements are the main gaps; Na-ion sits in the same UL and NFPA framework as Li-ion.
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/na-ion-storage-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/na-ion-storage-china-to-us.json

  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/toys-china-to-eu.json
- Toys & children’s products -> United Kingdom (UKCA): Chinese toy exporters targeting the UK Great Britain market must comply with the Toys (Safety) Regulations 2011 (SI 2011/1881), which requires testing to UK designated standards (BS EN 71-1, BS EN 71-2, BS EN 71-3, BS...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/toys-china-to-uk

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/toys-china-to-us

## Water electrolyzer (green hydrogen, AEM/PEM)
- Water electrolyzer (green hydrogen, AEM/PEM) -> European Union (CE): Beyond CE, the Pressure Equipment Directive (PED 2014/68/EU), ATEX requirements for hydrogen explosive atmospheres, and ISO 22734 are the major gaps.

  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/wireless-device-china-to-canada
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/wireless-device-china-to-canada.json
- Wireless / IoT device -> European Union (CE): Radio performance (EN 300 328 / EN 301 893), EMC (EN 301 489), electrical safety (EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11), and cybersecurity under RED Art. 3.3(d)-(f) mandatory from 1 August 2025 (EN 18031) are the major EU gaps com...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/wireless-device-china-to-eu
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/wireless-device-china-to-eu.json
- Wireless / IoT device -> India (BIS/ALMM): The main India gaps for a China-origin wireless/IoT device are WPC Equipment Type Approval (ETA) for de-licensed radio modules, WPC/SACFA clearance where licensed spectrum or fixed radio sites are involved, BIS CRS re...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/wireless-device-china-to-india
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/wireless-device-china-to-india.json
- Wireless / IoT device -> United Kingdom (UKCA): Radio Equipment Regulations 2017 (UKCA mark, BS EN 300 328 / 301 893), the PSTI Act 2022 IoT security baselines (unique passwords, vulnerability disclosure, update period — in force April 2024), and appointment of a U...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/wireless-device-china-to-uk
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/wireless-device-china-to-uk.json
- Wireless / IoT device -> United States (UL/FCC): FCC Certification via a TCB (Part 15 Subpart C/E for Wi-Fi/Bluetooth), a Supplier's Declaration of Conformity for unintentional radiators (Part 15 Subpart B), FCC ID labelling, designation of a US agent, and NRTL list...
  page: https://asaptic.com/standard/wireless-device-china-to-us
  data: https://asaptic.com/standard/exports/wireless-device-china-to-us.json
